name: lib-capacitor-nfc-pass-wallet
description: Cross-platform NFC pass wallet SDKs for Web, iOS, Android, and Flutter

scripts.build: npm run build -w @egym/nfc-pass-wallet-contracts && npm run build -w @egym/capacitor-nfc-pass-wallet
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @egym/nfc-pass-wallet-contracts && npm run typecheck -w @egym/capacitor-nfc-pass-wallet
scripts.lint:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd packages/android-sdk && gradle lint; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- gw lint; else cd packages/android-sdk && gradle lint; fi
scripts.lint:ios: cd packages/ios-sdk && (command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftlint lint || swift test)
scripts.lint:flutter: cd packages/flutter_nfc_pass_wallet && (command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1 && flutter analyze || echo 'flutter not found, skipping local flutter lint')
scripts.build:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd packages/android-sdk && gradle assemble; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- gw assemble; else cd packages/android-sdk && gradle assemble; fi
scripts.build:flutter: cd packages/flutter_nfc_pass_wallet && flutter pub get && flutter analyze
